description: A reusable unit of packages, files, scripts, and environment.

children.description: The encryption backend to use (e.g. "sops", "age").
children.name: backend

children.description: When encryption must be enforced. Defaults to `InRepo`.
children.name: mode

children.description: Encryption settings for this module file.
children.name: encryption

children.description: Unix permission bits (e.g. "600", "644") to apply after deployment.
children.name: permissions

children.description:
When true, the source file is local-only: auto-added to .gitignore,
silently skipped on machines where it doesn't exist.
children.name: private

children.description: Per-file deployment strategy override. If None, uses the global default.
children.name: strategy

children.description:
Skip the install script if this path already exists. A leading `~`
expands to the home directory; a relative path resolves against the
script's working directory. Existence follows symlinks. Only meaningful
for a `prefer: [script]` install; ignored otherwise.
children.name: creates

children.description:
Run the install script only if this command exits zero. A non-zero exit
skips the install (the condition for installing was not met). Only
meaningful for a `prefer: [script]` install; ignored for manager-backed
installs (those are idempotent via the manager's installed-package query).
children.name: onlyIf

children.description:
Run the install script only if this command exits NON-zero. A zero exit
(success) skips the install (the package already appears present). Only
meaningful for a `prefer: [script]` install; ignored otherwise.
children.name: unless

fields.description:
Platform tags gating the whole module. When non-empty and the current
platform matches none of them, the module is skipped entirely (it
appears as a Skipped action rather than vanishing). Tags are matched
against OS / distro / arch via `Platform::matches_any`; the canonical
macOS token is `macos`.
fields.name: platforms

fields.description:
System configurator settings contributed by this module.
Deep-merged into the profile system map; module values override profile values at leaf level.
fields.name: system

name: Module

description: A composable layer of modules, packages, files, and settings.

fields.description:
How far `spec.env` exports reach across the current user's environment.
Omitted means "inherit" (a parent layer's value survives); the resolved
default when no layer sets it is [`EnvScope::All`] — every standard user
entry point cfgd can safely touch. Narrow it to `Login` or `Interactive`
to opt out of the broader session surfaces.
fields.name: envScope

children.description: The encryption backend to use (e.g. "sops", "age").
children.name: backend

children.description: When encryption must be enforced. Defaults to `InRepo`.
children.name: mode

children.description: Encryption settings for this file.
children.name: encryption

children.description: Unix permission bits (e.g. "600", "644") to apply after deployment.
children.name: permissions

silently skipped on machines where it doesn't exist.
children.name: private

children.description: Per-file deployment strategy override. If None, uses the global default.
children.name: strategy

children.description:
Cargo package spec. Supports both list form (`cargo: [bat, ripgrep]`)
and object form (`cargo: { file: Cargo.toml, packages: [...] }`) via the
shared `list_or_struct` deserializer on the `PackagesSpec::cargo` field.
children.name: cargo

name: Profile

description: A published source of modules and profiles for multi-source config.

children.description: If set, restrict which backend is acceptable.
children.name: backend

children.description: If set, restrict which encryption mode is acceptable.
children.name: mode

children.description: Glob patterns or explicit paths that must be encrypted.
children.name: requiredTargets

children.description: Encryption requirements imposed on files delivered by this source.
children.name: encryption

children.description:
Require that the HEAD commit in this source's git repo has a valid
GPG or SSH signature. Subscribers can bypass with `security.allow-unsigned`.
children.name: requireSignedCommits

name: ConfigSource

description: The root cfgd configuration: active profile, sources, daemon, theme.

fields.description: AI assistant configuration: provider, model, and API key env var.
fields.name: ai

fields.description:
CLI aliases: map of alias name → command string.
Built-in defaults (add, remove) can be overridden or extended.
fields.name: aliases

fields.description: Compliance snapshot configuration.
fields.name: compliance

children.description:
Policy for daemon auto-reconciliation of detected drift.
`Auto` = silently apply (must opt-in), `NotifyOnly` = notify but don't
apply (safe default), `Prompt` = future interactive approval.
children.name: driftPolicy

children.description: Daemon drift reconciliation policy. PascalCase values match K8s enum conventions.
children.name: driftPolicy

children.description:
Per-module or per-profile reconcile overrides (kustomize-style patches).
Each patch targets a specific Module or Profile by name and overrides
individual reconcile fields. Precedence: Module patch > Profile patch > global.
children.name: patches

children.description:
Mirror daemon log output into the Windows Event Log under the `cfgd`
source, in addition to the default file appender at
`%LOCALAPPDATA%\cfgd\daemon.log`. No effect on Unix. Read by
`cfgd daemon install` to bake `--enable-event-log` into the service
binPath; changes require reinstalling the service to take effect.
children.name: windowsEventLog

fields.description: Global default file deployment strategy. Per-file overrides take precedence.
fields.name: fileStrategy

children.description: Short name / alias for this source (defaults to GitHub org name).
children.name: name

children.description: Git URL of the source repository.
children.name: url

children.description: Module registries — git repos containing modules in a prescribed directory structure.
children.name: registries

children.description:
Require GPG/SSH signatures on all remote module tags.
When true, unsigned modules are rejected unless `--allow-unsigned` is passed.
children.name: requireSignatures

children.description: Module security settings.
children.name: security

fields.description: Module configuration: registries and security.
fields.name: modules

children.description:
SSH `StrictHostKeyChecking` policy for git operations.
`AcceptNew` (default): accept first-seen keys, reject changed keys.
`Yes`: require keys to already exist in known_hosts (high-security).
`No`: accept any key (insecure, not recommended).
children.name: sshStrictHostKeyChecking

children.description:
Allow unsigned source content even when the source requires signed commits.
Intended for development/testing environments.
children.name: allowUnsigned

fields.description: Security settings for source signature verification.
fields.name: security

children.description:
SSH `StrictHostKeyChecking` policy for git operations.
`AcceptNew` (default): accept first-seen keys, reject changed keys.
`Yes`: require keys to already exist in known_hosts (high-security).
`No`: accept any key (insecure, not recommended).
children.name: sshStrictHostKeyChecking

children.description:
Subscriber opt-in to run lifecycle scripts (profile-layer and
source-delivered module bodies) from this source even when the source's
`constraints.no_scripts` would otherwise reject them. Default `false`:
the source's own `no_scripts` constraint governs.
children.name: allowScripts

children.description:
Fail-closed marker. When `true`, a failure to load this source (fetch,
manifest, signature, or an unresolvable `pinVersion`) is fatal — apply /
plan / compose abort rather than silently dropping the source. Default
`false` keeps the best-effort warn-and-continue behaviour for optional
sources. Use it for security or team baselines that must always be
composed in.
children.name: required

children.description:
Release channel to track (e.g. `stable`, `beta`). When unset, cfgd uses
its built-in default channel.
children.name: channel

children.description:
How often to check for updates, as a duration string (e.g. `24h`, `7d`,
`30m`) or a plain number of seconds. Defaults to `24h`.
children.name: interval

children.description: How update checks for the cfgd binary behave. Defaults to `Prompt`.
children.name: policy

children.description:
How skill update checks behave. Defaults to `Inherit` (defer to the
binary-level policy).
children.name: policy

children.description: Update policy for authored skills. Defaults to inheriting `policy`.
children.name: skills

fields.description: Update policy for the cfgd binary and authored skills.
fields.name: update

name: Config

description: Per-machine desired state reconciled by the cfgd operator.
name: MachineConfig

description: Namespace-scoped policy of required modules, packages, and settings.

fields.description: Modules staged as debug-only (CSI volume without volumeMount on declared containers).
fields.name: debugModules

fields.description: Kubernetes-style label selector with match_labels and match_expressions.
fields.name: targetSelector

name: ConfigPolicy

description: Cluster-scoped policy fanned out across selected namespaces.

fields.description: Modules staged as debug-only across matching namespaces.
fields.name: debugModules

fields.description: Select which namespaces this cluster policy applies to.
fields.name: namespaceSelector

name: ClusterConfigPolicy

description: A recorded drift event between desired and observed machine state.

fields.description: Typed reference to a MachineConfig resource.
fields.name: machineConfigRef

name: DriftAlert

description: Cluster-side Module CRD: an OCI-packaged module injected via CSI.

fields.description:
Controls how the module is mounted in pods.
`Always` (default): CSI volume + volumeMount on all declared containers + env vars.
`Debug`: CSI volume only — no volumeMount or env on declared containers.
  Only accessible via ephemeral debug containers (`kubectl cfgd debug`).
fields.name: mountPolicy

children.description: Per-platform package name overrides (e.g. {"brew": "gnu-sed", "apt": "sed"}).
children.name: platforms

fields.description: Scripts that run during module lifecycle.
fields.name: scripts

children.description: Certificate identity pattern for keyless verification (regex).
children.name: certificateIdentity

children.description: Certificate OIDC issuer pattern for keyless verification (regex).
children.name: certificateOidcIssuer

children.description: Enable keyless verification via Fulcio/Rekor (OIDC identity-based).
children.name: keyless

children.description: PEM-encoded public key for static key verification.
children.name: publicKey

children.description: Cosign configuration for OCI artifact signature verification.
children.name: cosign

fields.description: Signature configuration for a Module's OCI artifact.
fields.name: signature

name: Module (CRD)

description: Crossplane composite resource for team-level configuration. Fans out to per-user MachineConfig CRDs via composition function.

fields.description: Team name
fields.name: team

fields.description: Default profile for team members
fields.name: profile

children.description: Git URL of the team config repo
children.name: url

children.description: Git branch (default: master)
children.name: branch

fields.description: Team config source
fields.name: source

children.description: Module name
children.name: name

children.description: Git URL
children.name: url

children.description: Git ref (tag/commit)
children.name: ref

children.description: Remote module source reference
children.name: sourceRef

fields.description: Modules for the team
fields.name: modules

children.description: Required configuration items
children.name: required

children.description: Recommended configuration items
children.name: recommended

children.description: Locked (non-overridable) items
children.name: locked

children.description: Modules that must be installed
children.name: requiredModules

children.description: Modules that are recommended
children.name: recommendedModules

fields.description: Team policy settings
fields.name: policy

children.description: Username
children.name: username

children.description: SSH public key for enrollment
children.name: sshPublicKey

children.description: Profile override for this member
children.name: profile

children.description: Hostname override
children.name: hostname

fields.description: Team members
fields.name: members
